productDisplayName: Nike Men Lunarglide Black Sports Shoes
description: A take off on the LuarGlide, the nike LunarGlide+ 3 running shoe offers absolute cushioned comfort, better Fit and dynamic support. Perfect for underpronators and moderate overpronators, the Dynamic Support platform in the midsole adapts to the runner's varying stride and offers on-demand support. Featuring a nike+ Ready option, this shoe can be teamed with Nike+ compatible iPods, Stop watches and much more to clock your fitness regime.UpperBreathable mesh upper with nearly seamless construction for ample ventilation and reduced irritation Inner bootie that wraps around the foot offering exceptional comfort Extended Flywire panels for lightweight comfort, super strong support and more secure fit around the midfoot and heel Symmetrical lace-up system for a snug fitMeshed and padded tongue and sockliner for in-step comfortMidsoleFitSole cushioning for ultra-lightweight, springy cushioning and soft, responsive shock absorption Dynamic Support System to adapt to your stride Padded footbed for all-day comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthoticOutsoleEnvironmentally preferred rubber outsole for enhanced durability Carbon rubber under the heel for abrasion resistance Waffle pattern for maximum traction, with a scooped heel for extra cushioningShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
